name: Seal of the Initiate
description: Notes This is a starter ability for the Paladin class. It does not drop from enemies.
effects: On party: Healing, Damaging and HP Boost HP Boost: +10 (+2 per WIS over 50) max HP HP Boost Range: 4.5 (+1 per 10 WIS over 50) tiles HP Boost Duration: 2.5 (+1 per 10 WIS over 50) seconds Healing & Damaging Range: 4.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) tiles Healing & Damaging Duration: 2.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) seconds
